texto: Stop giving yourself permission to fail
autor: start giving yourself permission to succeed.You cannot win battles you have already lost in your mind.You cannot lose battles you have already won in your heart.
explicacao: Citação de start giving yourself permission to succeed.You cannot win battles you have already lost in your mind.You cannot lose battles you have already won in your heart. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Stop giving yourself permission to fail” articula reflexao, matshona-dhliwayo, giving em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
